title: CraftPlus
description: Inspired by Spigot CraftPlus plugins, this datapack will adds several useful recipes to your Minecraft worlds.
body:
# Description

Still searching for Enchanted Golden Apples?

Haven't found Saddle so you can finally ride the horses you found randomly?

You want to wear Chainmail Armors but can't find any of them?

Wanted to use Blast Furnace to make glass but found out you can't?

Your problems has been solved, with CraftPlus.

CraftPlus adds several useful crafting recipes and some minor tweaks to vanilla recipes, so your Minecraft experience becomes what you've always dreamed of.

# Example Recipes

## Ice blocks

![Ice Block Recipe](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/nztRmoPz/images/f2bb56d07d4283a8205f94f39503765876349719.png "Ice Block Recipe")

## Enchanted Golden Apple
